page_title: Daygood - One phrase can change your day.
hero_sub: Swipe away the bad vibes. Get your daily dose of dopamine, tailored just for you.
card1_desc: Just keep swiping. Endless quotes to light up your brain.
card1_extra: ✨ Over 10,000 curated quotes from philosophers, artists, and thought leaders — refreshed daily.
card2_extra: 🎨 Choose from 12 themes, custom fonts, and dark/light modes to match your style.
card3_extra: 📱 Swipe through a beautiful, distraction-free interface designed for your daily ritual.
card4_extra: 💜 Smart algorithm learns what lifts you up and delivers the right words at the right time.
card5_extra: 🌟 No ads, no subscriptions, no hidden costs. Just pure positivity in your pocket.
footer_sub: Join thousands of users changing their mindset.
privacy_sec1_desc: The DayGood App is designed to operate primarily locally on your device. Data created or managed within the app (such as your theme preferences, widget settings, scheduled notifications, or bookmarks) is stored locally on your device (via local databases). We do not store or transmit this personal data or user-generated content to our servers.
privacy_sec2_desc:
To improve the user experience and understand how the App is used, we integrate some third-party services provided by Google.

Google Analytics for Firebase
DayGood uses Google Analytics for Firebase to collect anonymous, aggregated data relating to application usage. This data includes:
  • App interactions (which screens you visit and features you use the most).
  • General device information (like phone model, OS version, language settings).
  • Any crash or malfunction data of the App.
This data is not linked to your personal identity and is used solely for statistical purposes, to fix bugs, and to improve DayGood's features. Google Analytics may use mobile device identifiers. You can find more information on how Google handles data by consulting their Privacy Policy.
privacy_sec3_desc:
To function correctly, DayGood may request certain system permissions:
  • Notifications: The App requires permission to send you local notifications (not sent from a remote server, but scheduled directly by your phone) to remind you to read your daily motivational quote.
These permissions can be revoked at any time through your Android device settings.
privacy_sec4_desc: The App includes a feature that allows you to share quotes or images with your friends or on social networks. This feature uses the native sharing mechanisms of your operating system. We do not track, record, or have access to the content you choose to share in this way or the recipients with whom you share it.
privacy_sec5_desc: The security of your data is important to us. Since DayGood stores the vast majority of data locally on your device, the security of this data depends on the security of your device itself (for example, the use of a screen lock). The anonymous data sent to Firebase is encrypted during transmission and protected by Google's security infrastructures.
privacy_sec6_desc:
• Local data deletion: You can delete all data saved by DayGood simply by uninstalling the application or using the "Clear data" function found in Android Settings under "Apps".
  • Tracking opt-out (Analytics): You can limit data collection by analytics services like Firebase by disabling ad personalization or resetting your advertising ID from your Google account settings on your Android device (Settings > Google > Ads).
privacy_sec7_desc: We may update our Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or for legal/operational reasons. We encourage you to check this page regularly. Continued use of the App after the publication of any changes will constitute acceptance of such changes.
privacy_sec8_desc:
If you have any questions, concerns, or suggestions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at the following email address:
{{contactEmail}}
tana_hero_sub: Beautiful, high-performance web and mobile applications designed to inspire and connect.
tana_sec_projects_sub: A curated selection of our latest creations.
tana_daygood_desc: One phrase can change your day. Swipe away the bad vibes and get your daily dose of tailored positivity in a stunning, distraction-free interface.
tana_nova_desc: An immersive data visualization platform for creative thinkers. Stay tuned for the release.
tana_sec_about_desc: We are a boutique design and engineering studio. We believe that software should not only work flawlessly but also be a joy to look at and interact with. Our approach combines state-of-the-art technologies with premium visual aesthetics.
